design_philosophy.core_principle: Clarity is King. Data is Queen.
anti_patterns: No gradient text on critical data
No infinite scrolling on data tables (use pagination)

usage_rules.headings: Use Manrope for all headings (h1-h4). Tight tracking (-0.02em).
usage_rules.body: Use Inter for all body text. Relaxed leading (1.6) for readability.
usage_rules.numbers: Use tabular-nums class for all data grids and dashboards to ensure alignment.

primary.description: Deep Navy for primary actions and active states

accent.description: Electric Indigo for focused UI elements and key highlights

gradients.subtle_mesh: bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-slate-100 via-white to-white dark:from-slate-900 dark:via-slate-950 dark:to-black
gradients.usage: Use strictly for page backgrounds, never for UI elements.

containers.card: rounded-lg border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

buttons.default: h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.dashboard_widget: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

tables.header: bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground font-medium text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-sm

icons.usage: Use specific icons for actions (e.g., Plus for add, Trash for delete). Avoid generic dots.

images.usage: Use primarily for user avatars and empty states.

categories.backgrounds: Abstract geometric or blurred office interiors (CSS preferred)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-to-background contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (ring-2 ring-offset-2)
accessibility.keyboard_nav: Full keyboard support for all menus and modals

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement 'ThemeToggle' component in the settings or sidebar.
Follow the 'Bento' grid layout for the main dashboard.
Ensure sidebar is collapsible on mobile.
Use Shadcn UI components for all interactive elements (Dialog, Sheet, Popover, etc.).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
Do not use gradients for text.
Keep the design minimal and data-focused.

universal_guidelines.interactive_elements: Must have hover, active, and focus states
universal_guidelines.empty_states: Must be visually distinct and provide a clear call to action
